items.title: Xi's anti-corruption drive began 14 years ago. Why are the purges still going?
items.dek: Critics say Xi's purges reveal a ruthless drive for absolute loyalty and total control of the military.
items.body: Critics say Xi's purges reveal a ruthless drive for absolute loyalty and total control of the military.

items.title: Under drone fire, exiled Kurds wait to confront Iranian regime
items.dek: A group of fighters based in Iraq say they are "ready to go home", as they face drone attacks from Tehran.
items.body: A group of fighters based in Iraq say they are "ready to go home", as they face drone attacks from Tehran.
